translation.\"+:\"\"-:\"{\"vip\": {\"+:premium\": \": Keys are user group names and values are operation mappings. Inner keys prefixed with "+:" add the specified group (key is the group name, value is the description); keys prefixed with "-:" remove the specified group; keys without a prefix add that group directly. Example: {"vip": {"+:premium": "Advanced group", "special": "Special group", "-:default": "Default group"}} means vip users can access the premium and special groups while removing access to the default group.
